pages.title: AI Operating System for Consulting Firms
pages.metaDescription: Install and run an AI Operating System for your consulting firm. We handle lead reply, engagement kickoff, proposal follow-up, and status reporting so partners can spend hours where the rate is.
pages.excerpt: An AI Operating System is the coordination layer that runs the work around the actual consulting. Here is what we install, in what order, and what done looks like.

pages.title: AI Operating System for Marketing Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Install and run an AI Operating System for your marketing agency. We handle lead reply, onboarding, reporting, and follow-up so the team gets the hours back.
pages.excerpt: An AI Operating System is the layer that runs the repeated work in the background for a marketing agency. Here is what we install, in what order, and what done looks like.

pages.title: AI Operating System for Web Design Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Install and run an AI Operating System for your web design agency. We handle lead reply, quotes, project updates, site care reporting, and invoice chase so designers can ship.
pages.excerpt: An AI Operating System is the coordination layer that runs the work around shipping the actual design. Here is what we install, in what order, and what done looks like.

pages.title: 60-Second Lead Response for Consulting Firms
pages.metaDescription: Every inbound consulting lead replied to in under 60 seconds, in your firm's voice, with your partner booking link. We build the first one free on your real leads.
pages.excerpt: For consulting firms, lead speed compounds. The prospect that gets a partner-level reply in 60 seconds is the one that takes the call. The fix is mechanical.

pages.title: 60-Second Lead Response for Marketing Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Every new lead replied to in under 60 seconds, in your agency's voice, with your booking link. We build the first one free on your real leads.
pages.excerpt: Most marketing agencies lose deals not on price but on speed. The fix is mechanical: answer every new lead in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link.

pages.title: 60-Second Lead Response for Web Design Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Every inbound web design lead replied to in under 60 seconds, in your studio's voice, with your booking link. We build the first one free on your real leads.
pages.excerpt: Web design leads shop fast. The studio that replies first usually wins the discovery call. Set the SLA to under 60 seconds and let the system carry it.

pages.title: How to Auto-Reply to Every Inbound Lead (Without Sounding Like a Bot)
pages.metaDescription: A clear spec for auto-replying to every inbound lead in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link. Build it yourself, or have us build it free.
pages.excerpt: Auto-replying to inbound leads is easy. Auto-replying in a way that does not sound like a bot, lands in 60 seconds, and gets the prospect onto your calendar takes a specific design.

pages.title: Lead Response Time Benchmarks for Agencies
pages.metaDescription: How fast is fast? Lead response time benchmarks for agencies, what the data actually says, and how to hit a 60-second SLA without burning out a human.
pages.excerpt: Most agencies overestimate how fast they reply to new leads. Median is closer to a day than to an hour. Here is what "fast" actually means, and what an honest 60-second SLA looks like.

pages.title: Speed to Lead: Why a 60-Second Reply Wins More Deals
pages.metaDescription: Lead response time is one of the strongest predictors of whether a lead closes. Here is the case for a 60-second SLA and how to actually hit it.
pages.excerpt: Lead response speed is one of the strongest, most repeatedly replicated predictors of close rate. Here is why, and how to actually hit a 60-second SLA without burning out a team.

pages.title: Automated Client Reporting for Consulting Firms
pages.metaDescription: Weekly and monthly client updates that draft themselves from live calendar, notes, and time data. The partner reviews and sends. Done-for-you reporting, not a template.
pages.excerpt: Weekly status updates and monthly engagement reports usually take partner time on a Friday. They do not have to. The data is already in your calendar and notes; the update should draft itself.

pages.title: Automated Client Reporting for Marketing Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Monthly client reports that draft themselves from live ad spend, analytics, and CRM data. We install it, you review and send. Done-for-you, not a template.
pages.excerpt: Monthly client reports take half a Friday per client at most agencies. They do not have to. The data is already live; the report should build itself.

pages.title: Automated Client Reporting for Web Design Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Monthly site care and retainer reports that draft themselves from live analytics, uptime, and project data. The PM reviews and sends. Done-for-you, not a template.
pages.excerpt: Monthly retainer and site care reports usually take PM time on the first of every month. They do not have to. Analytics, uptime, and project data are live; the report should draft itself.

pages.title: Client Onboarding Automation for Consulting Firms
pages.metaDescription: Every new engagement kicks off the same way: SOW countersign, intake, prep doc, kickoff. We install the onboarding flow so partners stop reinventing it per engagement.
pages.excerpt: Most firms reinvent the kickoff for every engagement. The unevenness shows up later as scope creep and client confusion. We install a flow that runs the same way every time.

pages.title: Client Onboarding Automation for Marketing Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Every new client gets the same crisp kickoff: contract, intake, kickoff deck, comms cadence. We install the onboarding flow so the worst experience matches the best.
pages.excerpt: Onboarding is the part of the agency experience clients judge first. We install a flow that runs the same way every time, so the worst onboarding matches the best.

pages.title: CRM Sync Without Copy-Paste for Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Stop pasting between your form, your inbox, and your CRM. We wire your tools so the CRM is always live, never lagging behind real conversations.
pages.excerpt: Most agency CRMs lag behind reality by days or weeks because nobody is paid to type forms and emails into HubSpot. The fix is to make typing unnecessary.

pages.title: Inbox Triage and Reply Drafts for Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Your inbox triaged, drafts written for routine replies in your voice, and high-priority items surfaced. We install the workflow so the inbox stops eating mornings.
pages.excerpt: The inbox eats the morning at most agencies because each message gets reprocessed from scratch. We install a triage layer that surfaces the few that need you and drafts the rest.

pages.title: Proposal and Quote Follow-Up for Consulting Firms
pages.metaDescription: Open proposals and SOWs followed up on day 3, 7, and 14, in your firm's voice, with no partner remembering. Lift close rate on deals already in your pipeline.
pages.excerpt: Most firms lose proposals to silence, not to a no. The fix is mechanical: a partner-voiced follow-up sequence that runs without anyone remembering.

pages.title: Proposal and Quote Follow-Up for Marketing Agencies
pages.metaDescription: Open proposals followed up on day 3, 7, and 14, in your voice, with no human remembering. Lift close rate on deals that are already in your pipeline.
pages.excerpt: Every agency has open proposals quietly going cold because nobody followed up on day 7. The fix is mechanical: a sequence in your voice that runs without anyone remembering.
